texto: Sometimes ideas are coming so fast that I have to stop doing one song to get another. But I don't forget the first one. If it works, it will always be there. It's like the truth: it will find you and lift you up. And if it ain't right, it will dissolve like sand on the beach.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Prince: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “Sometimes ideas are coming so fast that I have to stop doing one song to get another. But I don't…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, beach, ideas pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de trabalho e ideas.

frase_original: Sometimes ideas are coming so fast that I have to stop doing one song to get another. But I don't forget the first one. If it works, it will always be there. It's like the truth: it will find you and lift you up. And if it ain't right, it will dissolve like sand on the beach.
